title: ControlFlowGraphSchema
description: Standardized schema for storing and validating binary function Control Flow Graphs (CFG)

id.description: Hexadecimal base address matching the initial instruction of the basic block.

size.description: The size of the basic block in bytes.

instructions_count.description: Total count of disassembled machine instructions inside this basic block.

source.description: The address of the source basic block.

target.description: The address of the branch target basic block.

type.description: Flow semantic category of the branch.
